title: Homeshopa Food Storage Container, Set Of 5 Round Reusable Plastic Food Containers with Lids, Airtight Stackable Leak Proof Kitchen Pantry Containers, Microwave Freezer Dishwasher Safe Boxes
features: ROUND CONTAINERS WITH LIDS: Homeshopa storage containers come in a variety of sizes ranging from small to large and are made of sturdy BPA-free material to store all types of food and leftovers. This set contains 5 round containers ranging from 130, 300, 560, 950, 1720 ml that are ideal for a variety of occasions and events.

ORGANIZED AND TIDY SPACE: Keep your kitchen area organised and your cupboards/shelves tidy. Because our plastic containers stack, you can easily store them and free up space in your home. With the see-through sides, you can easily identify what's inside your pantry, refrigerator, or freezer. You could also use these versatile boxes to store art supplies and other items.

AIRTIGHT SEAL: The tight-sealing lids completely seal these reusable BPA Free containers, keeping the contents fresh for longer. This means you can transport your containers without fear of your food spoiling. Any of the portable containers will easily fit into your bag. Everything can now be stored without fear of leakage or spoilage.

FREEZER, DISHWASHER, AND MICROWAVE SAFE : Keep food fresh for long time by putting them in refrigerators. In the microwave, you can quickly and easily reheat food (removing the lid first). These stacable storage containers are also dishwasher safe, providing you with additional convenience and ease. (top shelf).

CAN BE USED OVER AND OVER: Because the airtight containers in this set are reusable, they are ideal for healthy meal preparation and portion control if you are on a diet or an athlete. They are ideal for bringing leftovers to work for lunch the next day or freezing them. Fruit, vegetables, soups, curries, sauces, and nuts can all be stored in storage box.
